positioning.title: A private advisory firm, not an agency
positioning.p1: Hadar Invest guides foreign buyers through their real estate projects in Israel: sourcing, analysis, negotiation and full follow-up, from the first viewing to the handover of the keys.
positioning.p2: We operate on the ground — alongside developers, lawyers, banks and architects — to defend your interests at every step, with the utmost discretion.
positioning.p3: A strategic vision of the Israeli market, serving families, private investors and family offices.
